metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills and plugins.

plugins.name: crap-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze recently-changed code for Change Risk Anti-Patterns. Multi-language (TS/JS, Python, Java, Kotlin, Go, Ruby, C#, Rust, PHP) with auto-discovered coverage toolchain.

plugins.name: zenify-my-terminal
plugins.description: Set up a fast, calm, focused terminal on macOS: WezTerm + zinit-managed zsh plugins + Starship or Oh My Posh prompt. Walks the choices, applies the setup, and skips macOS pitfalls (brew shellenv overhead, deprecated command-not-found tap, BSD ls, sub-process PATH for WezTerm, zinit turbo mode for fast startup).
